$comment: Example settings for Anthropic's sandbox-runtime (srt >= 1.0) wrapping ritual's headless agent runs. Install: npm i -g @anthropic-ai/sandbox-runtime; Arch deps: pacman -S bubblewrap socat ripgrep. Point [sandbox] wrapper at it: wrapper = "srt --settings /home/you/.config/ritual/srt-settings.json". srt 1.0's schema requires all four lists present (network.allowedDomains + deniedDomains, filesystem.allowWrite + denyWrite) — an omitted list is a hard error, so keep the empty [] entries below. Tune allowWrite to YOUR project layout; /var/tmp/ritual-target is this repo's cargo target dir. Validate with: srt --settings this-file -c 'echo ok'.
